skills.name: PDF
skills.description: Work with PDF files: read, extract text, forms, and tables

skills.name: Word Documents
skills.description: Create, read, and edit Microsoft Word .docx files

skills.name: Excel Spreadsheets
skills.description: Create, read, and edit Excel .xlsx spreadsheets

skills.name: PowerPoint Presentations
skills.description: Create and edit PowerPoint .pptx presentations

skills.name: Canvas Design
skills.description: Create visual designs, posters, and graphics

skills.name: Web App Testing
skills.description: Test web applications using browser automation

skills.name: MCP Builder
skills.description: Build and scaffold MCP servers

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Design and build frontend interfaces and components

skills.name: Algorithmic Art
skills.description: Create generative and algorithmic visual art

skills.name: Slack GIF Creator
skills.description: Create animated GIFs suitable for Slack and chat

skills.name: Context7
skills.description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7. Use when the user asks about libraries, frameworks, APIs, or SDKs (React, Next.js, Prisma, Supabase, Tailwind, Django, Vue, etc). Bypasses MCP via HTTP API with CONTEXT7_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: GitHub
skills.description: Operate on GitHub via REST API — repos, PRs, issues, code search, Actions, releases. Header-versioned (X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28), 5000 req/hour authenticated, separate search rate bucket. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Slack
skills.description: Operate Slack via its Web API — post/read/edit/delete messages, list channels and users, search, reactions, pins, file uploads (new getUploadURLExternal flow). HTTP 200 on errors (must check .ok field), bot vs user token scopes, tier-based rate limits, channel IDs (not names). Bypasses MCP via HTTP with SLACK_BOT_TOKEN (xoxb-) or SLACK_USER_TOKEN (xoxp-) env var.

skills.name: Notion
skills.description: Read and write Notion pages, databases, and blocks via the REST API — query databases with typed filters, create/update pages with schema-matching property values, append block content, workspace search. Focuses on the idiosyncratic object model (per-type property value shapes, rich-text arrays, recursive block trees). Bypasses MCP via HTTP with NOTION_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Linear
skills.description: Query and mutate Linear issues, projects, cycles, teams, workflow states, and comments via its GraphQL API — single endpoint, nested filter syntax, relay-style cursor pagination, complexity-scored rate limits. Auth quirk: personal API keys use bare Authorization header (no Bearer prefix); OAuth tokens do use Bearer. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with LINEAR_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Figma
skills.description: Read Figma files, component libraries, styles, comments, and export rendered assets (PNG / SVG / JPG / PDF) via Figma's REST API. Use when the user needs programmatic access to design files, to pull node data into code generation, or to export assets. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Jira
skills.description: Operate Jira Cloud via its REST v3 API — issues, projects, sprints, boards, comments, transitions, JQL search. Auth is Basic (not Bearer) with email + API token; rich-text fields (description, comment body) require Atlassian Document Format (ADF), a nested JSON tree, not plain strings. Search moved to /search/jql with token-based pagination. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with JIRA_BASE_URL + JIRA_EMAIL + JIRA_API_TOKEN env vars.

skills.name: Exa Search
skills.description: AI-first web search via Exa — semantic/neural ranking, category-scoped results (papers, news, companies), date filtering, and one-shot answer synthesis with citations. Use when the user needs current web info better ranked than generic web search, or a grounded answer with sources.

skills.name: Stripe
skills.description: Operate Stripe's REST API — customers, payments (PaymentIntents/Charges), refunds, subscriptions, invoices, Checkout Sessions, products/prices, payouts, disputes. Form-urlencoded bodies, amounts in smallest currency unit, Stripe-Version header pins behavior, cursor pagination. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with STRIPE_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Supabase
skills.description: Operate Supabase across its two REST surfaces: the Management API at api.supabase.com (projects, API keys, org admin — uses SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN PAT) and per-project APIs at {ref}.supabase.co (PostgREST database queries, Auth, Storage — require both apikey and Authorization headers with SUPABASE_ANON_KEY or SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY). Bypasses MCP via HTTP.

skills.name: Vercel
skills.description: Manage Vercel deployments, projects, env vars, domains, DNS, and build/runtime logs via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with VERCEL_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Netlify
skills.description: Operate Netlify's REST API — sites, deploys/builds, serverless + edge functions, env vars (with contexts), forms, DNS zones, and build hooks. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Cloudflare
skills.description: Manage Cloudflare DNS zones, Workers, Pages, R2, KV, D1, rulesets, and analytics via REST API — scoped API Tokens (not the legacy Global API Key), standard {success, errors, messages, result} envelope, separate S3-compatible host for R2 objects. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Railway
skills.description: Manage Railway projects, services, deployments, environments, variables, and deployment logs via Railway's public GraphQL API — single endpoint at backboard.railway.com/graphql/v2, relay-style pagination, two token flavors with different headers (account/workspace/OAuth use Authorization: Bearer; project tokens use Project-Access-Token). Tiered RPH/RPS limits. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with RAILWAY_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: Resend
skills.description: Send transactional emails, manage domains, contacts, audiences, and broadcasts via REST API. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with RESEND_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Sentry
skills.description: Query Sentry issues, events (stack traces), releases, deploys, replays, and org/project metadata via REST API. Use to diagnose production errors without UI screenshots. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN env var.

skills.name: PostHog
skills.description: Query PostHog product analytics via REST API — HogQL SQL queries over events, feature flags, experiments, insights, persons, cohorts, and session recording metadata. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with POSTHOG_PERSONAL_API_KEY env var (US or EU cloud).

skills.name: Lemon Squeezy
skills.description: Operate Lemon Squeezy (Merchant of Record for SaaS — EU VAT, chargebacks, sales tax handled for ~5% + fees) via its JSON:API REST endpoints. Covers stores, products, variants, checkouts, orders, subscriptions, customers, and license keys. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with LEMONSQUEEZY_API_KEY env var.

skills.name: Discord
skills.description: Operate Discord via its v10 REST API — post/read channel messages, manage guilds + roles, fire webhooks (no auth), register slash commands. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN env var (webhooks need no token).

skills.name: Wellread
skills.description: Collective research memory for AI coding agents — shared cache of already-paid-for research across all agents. Search prior findings before web-searching, save new research back so others skip it, view karma stats. Freshness-aware (timeless/stable/evolving/volatile windows, fresh/check/stale labels). Talks directly to the hosted MCP endpoint via JSON-RPC over Streamable HTTP with an auto-registered, anonymous API key (WELLREAD_API_KEY) — no local MCP server required.

skills.name: n8n
skills.description: Operate n8n's Public API v1 — workflow CRUD with activate/deactivate, execution list/get/retry/stop, credentials (with per-type schema lookup), tags, variables, users, projects, insights. X-N8N-API-KEY custom header (not Authorization), cursor pagination. REST API does NOT run workflows on demand — triggering is via the per-node Webhook URL. Bypasses MCP via HTTP with N8N_BASE_URL + N8N_API_KEY env vars; works on self-hosted and n8n Cloud.

skills.name: Brainstorming
skills.description: Structured brainstorming workflow for exploring problem space before committing to a solution.

skills.name: Dispatching Parallel Agents
skills.description: Coordinate multiple agents in parallel for tasks that decompose cleanly into independent subtasks.

skills.name: Executing Plans
skills.description: Execute a previously written plan step-by-step with checkpoints and verification.

skills.name: Finishing a Development Branch
skills.description: Wrap up a feature branch cleanly: final review, commit hygiene, merge prep.

skills.name: Receiving Code Review
skills.description: Respond to code review feedback constructively — address comments, update PR, track unresolved items.

skills.name: Requesting Code Review
skills.description: Prepare a PR for review — title, description, test plan, reviewers, and self-review checklist.

skills.name: Subagent-Driven Development
skills.description: Delegate focused subtasks to specialized subagents while maintaining overall direction.

skills.name: Systematic Debugging
skills.description: Structured debugging workflow: reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, verify. Avoid shotgun fixes.

skills.name: Test-Driven Development
skills.description: Strict red-green-refactor TDD workflow. Write the test first, watch it fail, then implement minimally.

skills.name: Using Git Worktrees
skills.description: Work on multiple branches simultaneously with git worktree — when it's worth the complexity.

skills.name: Using Superpowers
skills.description: Meta-skill: how to use the Superpowers workflow suite as a coherent whole.

skills.name: Verification Before Completion
skills.description: Verify the work actually works before marking a task done — avoid premature 'done' signals.

skills.name: Writing Plans
skills.description: Write a concrete implementation plan before writing code — structure, steps, unknowns, verification.

skills.name: Writing Skills
skills.description: How to author new skills in the Superpowers / Claude Code skill format.
